opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My coworker just dropped dead at his desk from a heart attack today. We are the exact same age, and now my chest is tight and I'm terrified it's happening to me.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Witnessed a same-age colleague die suddenly at work today and now has chest tightness and a racing heart; wants to know whether his own heart is okay and what he should do.

symptom_narrative.onset: this afternoon, a few hours after watching a colleague collapse and die at work
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours, on and off since the event
symptom_narrative.character: chest feels tight, heart is racing and pounding, keyed up and shaky
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: feels intense and frightening — convinced something terrible is about to happen to his heart
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: middle of the chest, feels tight
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse when he thinks about what happened; eases a little when his wife talks him down
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting with his wife and trying to breathe slowly seems to settle it a bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about his colleague, checking his own pulse, and worrying it is a heart attack
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sweaty, breathing fast, trembling, a strong sense of dread
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before; has never had chest pain or tightness with exercise or exertion in the past
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: too distressed to settle or sleep tonight; pacing around the house

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally well, no ongoing medical conditions that he knows of

family_history_as_reported.narrative: not sure about heart problems running in the family; says he has never really looked into it

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: drinks a fair bit — a few most nights, says probably more than he should
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: eats a lot of takeaway, does hardly any exercise, sits at a desk all day
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: office worker; badly shaken after seeing a same-age colleague die suddenly at work today; spouse present and supportive

objective_data_offered.value: he's pacing around the room, sweating, breathing fast and looks really frightened
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's description over the phone, not a clinician observation

objective_data_offered.value: he's breathing fast and shallow, kind of hyperventilating
about 95 kg on the bathroom scales
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported from home scales, not calibrated
